# Task: Implement layered audio mixing engine

> Task ID: SPECTRAL-S01-T01
> Sprint: [SPECTRAL-S01](../INDEX.md)
> Status: 📝 draft
> Estimate: M

## Description

SoundEngine.run plays only _brown_noise regardless of the mood profile. Iterate profile[layers], synthesize each known layer (brown noise, sine, binaural already exist as helpers), sum with numpy (pre-allocated buffers, vectorized — no per-callback allocations), normalize the mix.
